simple_types.name: CFA_SMT_Variable_Tag
simple_types.code:
type CFA_SMT_Variable_Tag is
  (ITEM_TOP,
   ITEM_INTEGER,
   ITEM_FLOAT,
   ITEM_DOUBLE,
   ITEM_LONG,
   ITEM_NULL,
   ITEM_UNINITIALIZED_THIS,
   ITEM_OBJECT,
   ITEM_UNINTIALIZED)
with Size => 8;

simple_types.name: CFA_StackMapTable_Type
simple_types.code:
type CFA_StackMapTable_Type is
  (SAME,
   SAME_LOCALS_1_STACK_ITEM,
   RESERVED,
   SAME_LOCALS_1_STACK_ITEM_EXTENDED,
   CHOP,
   SAME_FRAME_EXTENDED,
   APPEND,
   FULL_FRAME);

simple_types.name: Class_File_Attribute_Type
simple_types.code:
type Class_File_Attribute_Type is
  (ConstantValue,
   Code,
   StackMapTable,
   Exceptions,
   InnerClasses,
   EnclosingMethod,
   Synthetic,
   Signature,
   …,
   Other);

simple_types.name: Class_File_Magic
simple_types.code:
type Class_File_Magic is
  new u4.Big_Endian range 16#CAFEBABE# .. 16#CAFEBABE#;

simple_types.name: Constant_Pool_Entry_Tag
simple_types.code:
type Constant_Pool_Entry_Tag is
  (UTF_8,
   INTEGER,
   FLOAT,
   LONG,
   DOUBLE,
   CLASS,
   STRING,
   FIELD_REFERENCE,
   …,
   INVOKE_DYNAMIC)
with Size => 8;

simple_types.name: Method_Handle_Reference_Kind
simple_types.code:
type Method_Handle_Reference_Kind is
  (REF_GET_FIELD,
   REF_GET_STATIC,
   REF_PUT_FIELD,
   REF_PUT_STATIC,
   REF_INVOKE_VIRTUAL,
   REF_INVOKE_STATIC,
   REF_INVOKE_SPECIAL,
   REF_NEW_INVOKE_SPECIAL,
   REF_INVOKE_INTERFACE)
with Size => 8;

simple_types.name: Positive_u4
simple_types.code: type Positive_u4 is new u4.Big_Endian range 1 .. u4.Big_Endian'Last;

array_types.name: Raw_Data
array_types.code: type Raw_Data is array (u4.Big_Endian range <>) of Byteflippers.Unsigned_8;

array_types.name: Raw_Data_Filled
array_types.code:
type Raw_Data_Filled is
  array (Positive_u4 range <>) of Byteflippers.Unsigned_8;

subtypes.name: Class_Utf_8_String
subtypes.code:
subtype Class_Utf_8_String is Standard.String
with Predicate => Class_Utf_8_String'Length <= u2.Big_Endian'Last;

subtypes.name: Constant_Pool_Index
subtypes.code: subtype Constant_Pool_Index is i2.Big_Endian range 1 .. i2.Big_Endian'Last;
